non_coverage: does not override dirty-tree or Agent Mail reservations
does not claim cache warmth is proof success

side_effect_policy.notes: This artifact only defines deterministic input shape and fixture coverage for later admission logic.

host_profile.description: Local machine capacity observed before scheduling proof lanes.

required_fields.name: cpu_cores
required_fields.reason: Admission must know physical scheduling width.

required_fields.name: memory_bytes
required_fields.reason: Admission must know RAM headroom relative to proof peak memory.

required_fields.name: numa_nodes
required_fields.reason: Large-core hosts need a stable locality signal.

required_fields.name: profile_class
required_fields.reason: Operators need a coarse resource-governance posture.

resource_pressure.description: Fresh CPU, memory, and I/O pressure telemetry.

required_fields.name: telemetry_sampled_at_utc
required_fields.reason: Stale pressure telemetry must fail closed.

required_fields.name: telemetry_age_seconds
required_fields.reason: Admission is only meaningful for fresh pressure data.

required_fields.name: cpu_busy_bps
required_fields.reason: CPU saturation determines queue or split recommendations.

required_fields.name: memory_available_bytes
required_fields.reason: Proof lanes must leave explicit RAM headroom.

required_fields.name: io_some_avg10_bps
required_fields.reason: I/O pressure determines whether heavy Cargo lanes should wait.

disk_headroom.description: Local disk and target-dir parent capacity.

required_fields.name: root_free_bytes
required_fields.reason: Root pressure can make logs and artifacts unsafe.

required_fields.name: tmp_free_bytes
required_fields.reason: rch target dirs often live below tmp.

required_fields.name: target_parent_free_bytes
required_fields.reason: Admission must protect isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIR storage.

required_fields.name: pressure_class
required_fields.reason: Operator receipts need a compact disk-pressure class.

rch_workers.description: Remote worker availability and cache-warm telemetry.

required_fields.name: remote_required
required_fields.reason: Proof evidence must distinguish remote execution from local fallback.

required_fields.name: telemetry_sampled_at_utc
required_fields.reason: Worker state goes stale quickly under swarm load.

required_fields.name: telemetry_age_seconds
required_fields.reason: Old worker telemetry must queue or fail closed.

required_fields.name: workers
required_fields.reason: Admission needs per-worker queue, pressure, and warmth rows.

active_project_exclusion.description: Same-project exclusion state for remote workers.

required_fields.name: local_project_active
required_fields.reason: Local active project state determines whether local fallback is contaminating.

required_fields.name: same_project_workers_excluded
required_fields.reason: Receipts must name excluded workers without using them.

required_fields.name: remote_worker_required
required_fields.reason: Remote-required lanes must not silently fall back.

cargo_target_isolation.description: Per-agent, per-bead, per-lane Cargo target-dir isolation.

required_fields.name: target_dir_template
required_fields.reason: Suggested commands must preserve isolated CARGO_TARGET_DIRs.

required_fields.name: agent_scoped
required_fields.reason: Agents must not share target dirs while editing shared main.

required_fields.name: bead_scoped
required_fields.reason: A proof lane's cache should not be mistaken for another bead's evidence.

required_fields.name: lane_scoped
required_fields.reason: Narrow and broad lanes need independent cache/evidence surfaces.

required_fields.name: forbid_shared_target_dir
required_fields.reason: Shared target dirs contaminate proof evidence under parallel swarms.

agent_mail_reservations.description: Active reservation pressure from Agent Mail.

required_fields.name: telemetry_age_seconds
required_fields.reason: Reservation state must be fresh enough to guard edits.

required_fields.name: tracker_reserved
required_fields.reason: Tracker reservations control whether br mutations are safe.

required_fields.name: active_peer_source_reservations
required_fields.reason: Peer-owned source files can block proof execution.

required_fields.name: active_self_reservations
required_fields.reason: Self-owned source files can allow path-limited source work.

dirty_tree.description: Dirty-tree ownership classification before proof execution.

required_fields.name: classification
required_fields.reason: Proof evidence must not include unowned or peer-owned source dirt.

required_fields.name: dirty_paths
required_fields.reason: Receipts must name exact dirty paths.

required_fields.name: peer_owned_paths
required_fields.reason: Peer-owned dirty paths force wait or handoff.

required_fields.name: unreserved_source_paths
required_fields.reason: Unreserved source dirt cannot be silently validated.

proof_lane.description: The proof lane being considered for admission.

required_fields.name: lane_id
required_fields.reason: Receipts must identify the exact proof lane.

required_fields.name: workspace_package
required_fields.reason: Cargo proof commands are package-scoped.

required_fields.name: lane_family
required_fields.reason: Cache warmth and cost estimates are family-scoped.

required_fields.name: estimated_cost
required_fields.reason: Admission cannot reason about CPU, RAM, I/O, or lane weight without cost.

required_fields.name: command_template
required_fields.reason: Operator receipts must include the exact next command shape.

cross_section_invariants.description: resource_pressure, rch_workers, and agent_mail_reservations telemetry_age_seconds must be present and no greater than 900.
remote_required proof lanes must either name an admissible remote worker or fail closed before validation.
target_dir_template must include agent, bead, and lane variables and every command_template must include CARGO_TARGET_DIR.
peer_owned_paths or unreserved_source_paths make the input incomplete for proof execution.
proof_lane.estimated_cost must include CPU, memory, I/O, and proof_weight before a scheduler can split or queue lanes.

operator_receipt_logging.redaction_policy: worker ids may be stable handles; paths stay project-relative; secrets are forbidden

fixture_coverage.description: Complete 64-core / 256 GiB host profile with fresh telemetry, clean dirty-tree state, isolated target dir, and an admissible remote worker.
Required rch worker telemetry timestamp is absent or stale.
fixture_coverage.input_mutation: remove rch_workers.telemetry_sampled_at_utc and set telemetry_age_seconds above 900

fixture_coverage.description: Dirty source path is owned by another active Agent Mail reservation.
fixture_coverage.input_mutation: set dirty_tree.classification to peer-owned-source and add a matching active_peer_source_reservations row

fixture_coverage.description: All remote workers are saturated or excluded by active-project policy.
fixture_coverage.input_mutation: set every rch_workers.workers[*].queue_state to saturated or active_project_excluded to true

fixture_coverage.description: CARGO_TARGET_DIR parent does not have enough free bytes for the lane's estimated I/O footprint.
fixture_coverage.input_mutation: set disk_headroom.pressure_class to low and target_parent_free_bytes below proof_lane.estimated_cost.io_bytes

validation.remote_required_contract_test: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/rch_target_proof_lane_admission_input_schema cargo test -p asupersync --test proof_lane_admission_input_schema_contract -- --nocapture
validation.dirty_tree_caveat: Do not cite remote proof success while peer-owned dirty source or untracked proof files are present in the shared working tree.
